Test Title: Loading state shows ""Loading discoveries..."" while data fetches
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to /discover
2. Observe before models load
Expected Result: Centered text ""Loading discoveries..."" is displayed while modelsLoading or contentLoading is true

Test Title: Hero section renders with teal-to-white gradient background
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to /discover
2. Observe the top hero section
Expected Result: Hero area has a linear-gradient from teal-lt to white with a bottom border

Test Title: Live badge renders with pulsing teal dot and ""Updated daily | Latest AI releases"" text
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to /discover
2. Observe the pill badge above the H1
Expected Result: Teal-bordered pill with animated pulsing dot and text ""Updated daily | Latest AI releases"" is visible

Test Title: H1 renders ""Discover New Models"" with ""New Models"" in teal color
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to /discover
2. Observe the H1 heading
Expected Result: H1 reads ""Discover New Models""; the words ""New Models"" are rendered in teal color

Test Title: H1 font size is responsive using clamp(2rem 4vw 3.5rem)
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to /discover
2. Resize the browser window
Expected Result: H1 font size scales fluidly between 2rem and 3.5rem based on viewport width

Test Title: Hero subtitle renders correct descriptive text
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to /discover
2. Observe paragraph below H1
Expected Result: Text ""Stay ahead with the latest AI model releases. From frontier reasoning to specialized tools."" is visible

Test Title: Category filter chip bar renders below the hero section
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to /discover
2. Observe the sticky bar below the hero
Expected Result: A white bar with horizontally scrollable category chip buttons is visible below the hero

Test Title: All"" category chip is active by default with teal style
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to /discover
2. Observe category chips
Expected Result: All"" chip has teal background + white text + teal border; other chips have bg + text2 style"

Test Title: Active category chip has teal background and white text
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to /discover
2. Click any non-All category chip
Expected Result: Clicked chip shows teal background + white text; previously active chip reverts to inactive style

Test Title: Newly Released"" section heading shows filtered model count
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to /discover
2. Observe the section heading above the new models grid
Expected Result: H2 reads ""Newly Released | {N} models"" where N equals the count of filtered new models

Test Title: Newly Released grid uses auto-fill layout with min card width 320px
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to /discover
2. Observe the Newly Released card grid
Expected Result: Cards arranged in auto-fill columns with minmax(320px 1fr); responsive to viewport

Test Title: Each new model card shows icon name new badge org rating
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to /discover
2. Observe any card in the Newly Released section
Expected Result: 44×44 icon + model name (Syne bold) + ""new"" badge + org label + ""Rating {value}"" are all visible

Test Title: Every new model card always shows a ""new"" badge
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to /discover
2. Inspect all cards in Newly Released section
Expected Result: Every card in the Newly Released grid has the ""new"" badge (badge-new class) regardless of category filter

Test Title: New model card shows full description text (not truncated)
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to /discover
2. Inspect the description paragraph on any new model card
Expected Result: Full model description is rendered without truncation (unlike marketplace 85-char limit)

Test Title: New model card shows up to 4 tags as chips
Test Steps:

2. Observe tag chips on any new model card
Expected Result: Up to 4 tag chips are shown per card with bg2 background and pill style

Test Title: New model card shows price in accent color
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to /discover
2. Observe the price element on any new model card
Expected Result: Price text is rendered in accent color with bold weight

Test Title: New model card shows Details and Try Now buttons
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to /discover
2. Observe card footer buttons
Expected Result: Two buttons per card: ""Details"" (bg2/outlined) and ""Try Now"" (teal filled / white text)

Test Title: Newly Released section shows at most 20 models
Test Steps:

2. Count cards in the Newly Released grid with All category selected
Expected Result: Maximum of 20 new model cards are rendered

Test Title: Trending This Week"" section heading is visible

2. Scroll to the bottom section

Test Title: Trending section grid uses auto-fill layout with min card width 280px

2. Observe the Trending grid layout
Expected Result: Cards are in auto-fill columns with minmax(280px 1fr)

Test Title: Trending section shows at most 6 models
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to /discover
2. Count cards in Trending This Week section

Test Title: Each trending card shows icon name price rating and Try button
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to /discover
2. Observe any trending card
Expected Result: Card shows: 40×40 icon + model name (bold) + ""{price} | Rating {rating}"" + ""Try"" button

Test Title: Trending cards source only models with badge = ""hot""
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to /discover
2. Inspect trending cards
3. Verify each has a hot badge origin
Expected Result: All models in Trending section have badge=""hot"" in the catalog

Test Title: Newly Released cards source only models with badge = ""new""
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to /discover
2. Inspect newly released cards
Expected Result: All models in Newly Released section have badge=""new"" in the catalog

Test Title: Clicking a category chip filters Newly Released cards
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to /discover
2. Click a non-All category chip
Expected Result: Cards update to show only new models whose tags or types match the selected category

Test Title: Category filter matches by tag (case-insensitive partial match)
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to /discover
2. Click a category chip
Expected Result: New models are included if any of their tags contain the category string (case-insensitive)

Test Title: Category filter also matches by model type
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to /discover
2. Click a category chip whose value matches a model type
Expected Result: New models are included if their types array contains the category value (lowercased)

Test Title: Selecting ""All"" category chip shows all new models
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to /discover
2. Click a non-All chip to filter
3. Click "All"
Expected Result: All new models (up to 20) are shown again; no category restriction applied

Test Title: Switching category chip updates model count in section heading
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to /discover
2. Click a specific category chip
3. Observe section heading
Expected Result: Newly Released | {N} models"" count updates to reflect filtered result count"

Test Title: Category chip with no matching new models shows 0 in heading
Test Steps:

2. Click a category chip that matches no new models
Expected Result: Section heading reads ""Newly Released | 0 models""; grid is empty

Test Title: Trending section is not affected by category chip selection

2. Click any category chip

Expected Result: Trending This Week cards remain unchanged regardless of which category chip is active
